Commissions

Got a wall, an event, or a brand that needs real spray? Tell me about the project and I'll get back within two business days. Based in Jacksonville, FL, available for travel.

What I Do

  • Murals

    Interior or exterior walls, any scale. Residential, retail or civic.

  • Live Painting

    Events, festivals and brand activations painted in real time.

  • Brand Collabs

    Custom capsules, packaging art and limited co-branded drops.

  • Custom Pieces

    Canvases, decks and one-off commissions for collectors.

Start the Brief

Helps me gauge travel and permits.

◈ Or email direct: hello@neonconcrete.example

Thanks — I'll hit you back within two business days. Check your inbox for a confirmation.
